category_sources: Official libnatpmp page describes NAT-PMP as NAT traversal and libnatpmp as a portable client-side implementation.
source_facts.description: NAT port mapping protocol library
display_name_sources: Official MiniUPnP libnatpmp page heading uses libnatpmp.
docs_sources: Official libnatpmp page includes protocol description, build instructions, API usage, and sample code.
repo_sources: Official MiniUPnP homepage links to miniupnp on GitHub; the miniupnp/libnatpmp README points back to the official MiniUPnP libnatpmp documentation.
tags_sources: Official libnatpmp page describes NAT-PMP, NAT traversal, client-side implementation, and natpmp.h API usage.
source_facts.description identifies NAT port mapping protocol library.
